title: S.P.E.E.D Assessment
synonyms: S.P.E.E.D – Spinal Emergency Evaluation of Deficits

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The S.P.E.E.D (Spinal Emergency Evaluation of Deficits) assessment is a rapid neurological assessment tool used to evaluate suspected acute spinal cord injury, focusing on motor and sensory function to identify possible deficit patterns. It is an adjunct to overall trauma assessment and spinal-motion-restriction decision making, and serial reassessment is important if the patient is deteriorating or evolving.
